header: Customers rated us. We framed it.
description: How verified customers scored Desiderio across six delivery dimensions in the Q1 2026 survey (0 = poor, 5 = excellent). No dimension below 4 — and support is where the creators shine.
axes:
Performance | 4.6
Reliability | 4.8
Editor experience | 4.4
Accessibility | 4.3
Security & governance | 4.1
Support | 4.7
